description:
The image displays two satellite maps illustrating an amendment process for defining Riparian Zones (RZ) Area of Interest (AoI) based on Strahler river segments. The underlying imagery shows a landscape comprising forests (dark green), agricultural fields (light green/yellow), and water bodies (dark blue).

The left map shows:
- An "old AoI" (yellow shaded area) along a river in the lower-central portion.
- "hanging" Strahler 2 river segments (blue lines) in the upper-left, associated with a new AoI (green shaded area). This new green AoI is visually disconnected from the "old AoI" (yellow). The caption states this represents "Strahler level 2 river-related AoI (upper left) incorrectly disconnected from the existing AoI (yellow)".

The right map shows the amended connectivity:
- The "old AoI" (yellow) remains in the lower-central portion.
- A "connecting Strahler 3 segment (blue) and AoI (green)" now links the upper-left green AoI (previously "hanging") with the lower-central yellow AoI, creating a continuous RZ AoI. The caption indicates this connection was "amended through incorporation of a “missing” Strahler level 3 river segment".

A coordinate pair (4517890/ 2979832) is provided, likely for the geographical reference of the depicted area.
